message:
Fix stat block navigation to use React Router instead of hard refresh (#4964)

Replace window.location.href with navigate() from React Router in all
stat block click handlers (Nodes, CPUs, Memory, Storage, Pods) on the
My Clusters dashboard. This prevents a full page reload and provides
smooth client-side navigation to Compute, Storage, and Workloads pages.

Fixes #4961

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
